field needs + priorities

Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 09A Identity Gating
5-band scoring (brand 0.35 +
model 0.35 + variant 0.15 +
hard IDs 0.15 + penalties)
cross-source gate (4 requirements)
Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 09B Consensus Engine
candidate clustering + acceptance
tier/method weights + pass targets
selection + list union reducers
core/deep gates
Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 09C Post-Consensus Refinement
component prior + deterministic critic
LLM validator + inference policy
aggressive extraction + runtime gate
Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 09D Validation Gate
6 checks: identity + confidence +
anchors + completeness + quality +
critical fields → publishable
Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 10A Artifact Export
3-tier: runs/ → latest/ → final/
shouldPromoteFinal() comparison
SpecDb dual-write (4 tables)
Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 10B Learning Gate
per-field acceptance → 4 stores
(urlMemory, domainFieldYield,
fieldAnchors, componentLexicon)
Status: COMPLETE

div.style: color: rgb(248, 255, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 10C Publishing Pipeline
3-gate: data quality → category
gate → block_publish_when_unk
semver + changelog + exports
Status: COMPLETE
